comments.body: STATUS 2026-07-12 (/rebar-implement): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED locally as 4707cd54e on branch epic/9d50-calibration-followup (worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-epic-9d50), part of an 8-commit stack. Locally green: pre-commit make lint + make typecheck passed; code leaves validated under held-out TDD (RED-first, implementer held out from the edge oracle, restored full oracle green, mutation/teeth check). NOT yet pushed to Gerrit and NOT closed. REMAINING: push the stack to gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main, get LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1, then transition f32e-53cf-7db5-4781 in_progress closed (completion-verifier close gate runs). Do NOT close before this change's Gerrit Verified +1 (per CLAUDE.local.md).

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Change #529's sole advisory — 'the new degrade behavior has no test; all classifier tests importorskip pydantic_ai so a core-only env never exercises it' — scored severity none / impact 0.0, then proved out as a red-main incident 57 minutes after merge (fix #530). No threshold can catch a finding scored 0.0: this is a pass-2/impact-model vocabulary gap in impact_code (src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/decide.py:230-267), whose maint lane has safety_net_removal_without_replacement but nothing for 'change introduces/unmasks a reachable path with NO automated coverage'. Distinct from the blocking-lane stories: those tune pass-3 thresholds; this fixes what pass 2 can express.

## What
- Add a maint-lane consequence BINARY `reachable_path_without_automated_coverage` — a **bool** (True/False), like every other entry in `_CODE_MAINT_BINARIES` (NOT graded none/low/medium/high; consequence binaries are bool and the tier lives in the code). It is True when the change introduces or unmasks a reachable code path with NO automated test coverage. Named edit sites:
  - `src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/decide.py`: add `reachable_path_without_automated_coverage` to `_CODE_MAINT_BINARIES` (decide.py:198-205) at **tier moderate (0.6)** — abstain-safe (absent/False → contributes 0, never inflates, per `_code_truthy`).
  - `src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/verify.py`: add the bool field to the code-review severity attrs (`code_review_verification_model` / CodeSeverityAttrs), consistent with the other consequence-binary bools.
  - `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-verify.md`: add the binary to the CODE-REVIEW CONSEQUENCE BINARIES section (MAINTAINABILITY lane) with a yes/no definition (when is it True) — bool, no graded vocabulary.
- Per ADR 0036 a formula/vocabulary change REQUIRES an IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION bump: `code-v2 → code-v3` in `src/rebar/llm/code_review/sidecar.py` (L26). Update the version-pinning test `tests/unit/test_impact_model_versioning.py` (the `== "code-v2"` assertion at line ~34 → `code-v3`). A fresh version-segmented cohort is required before any threshold consumes code-v3 (out of scope here — 9f25/b9c0 stay on code-v2).
- Replay #529's finding through the extended model: add a `reachable_path_without_automated_coverage: true` labeled row (label HIGH) to `tests/unit/fixtures/code_review_impact_labels.jsonl` so the A/B gate (ab_impact_model.py) exercises the new binary, and add a unit test in `tests/unit/test_impact_code.py` asserting a #529-shaped attrs dict scores impact > 0 under code-v3.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The new bool binary `reachable_path_without_automated_coverage` exists in `_CODE_MAINT_BINARIES` (decide.py, tier moderate 0.6), in the verify severity model (verify.py), and in code-review-verify.md with an abstain-safe default and a clear True/False (yes/no) definition (NOT graded levels).
- [ ] IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION is bumped to code-v3 in sidecar.py, sidecars carry it, and `test_impact_model_versioning.py`'s version assertion is updated to `code-v3` (from `code-v2`).
- [ ] `tests/unit/fixtures/code_review_impact_labels.jsonl` gains a HIGH-labeled row exercising the new binary, and a unit test in `test_impact_code.py` replays a #529-shaped finding asserting impact > 0 under code-v3 while the code-v2 impact of old (binary-absent) sidecars is byte-unchanged (0 contribution when absent).
- [ ] make lint passes on the change.
- [ ] make typecheck passes on the change.
- [ ] make test passes on the change.

file_impact.reason: add reachable_path_without_automated_coverage to _CODE_MAINT_BINARIES at tier moderate 0.6
add bool field to code-review severity attrs
add binary definition (yes/no) to maintainability lane
add HIGH row exercising new binary
replay #529-shaped finding asserts impact>0 under code-v3

compiled_state.title: impact_code lane gap: untested-degradation / unmasked-regression findings score 0.0 (code-v3 bump)
